Sensitivity Analysis

Dose-Response Meta-Analysis

Demo Datasets

Coffee & Mortality

16 data points from 4 studies. Protective effect plateauing at 3-4 cups/day.

Alcohol & CVD

14 data points. Classic J-shaped relationship.

Physical Activity & Depression

12 data points. Threshold effect with diminishing returns.

BMI & Diabetes

10 data points. Exponential increase in risk.

Network Meta-Analysis

Compare multiple treatments simultaneously using direct and indirect evidence

⚠ BETA — Network Meta-Analysis has not yet been validated against established NMA software (R netmeta, gemtc, WinBUGS). Results should be considered exploratory. For regulatory or publication purposes, cross-check key results with validated software.
